nasb.text: For behold, darkness will cover the earth And deep darkness the peoples; But the Lord will rise upon you And His glory will appear upon you.

esv.text: For behold, darkness shall cover the earth, and thick darkness the peoples; but the Lord will arise upon you, and his glory will be seen upon you.

cnv.text: 看哪！黑暗遮蓋大地， 幽暗遮蔽萬民； 但耶和華要升起來照耀你， 他的榮耀要彰顯在你身上。

ccb.text: 看啊，黑暗遮盖大地， 幽暗笼罩万民， 但耶和华必照耀你， 祂的荣耀必照在你身上。

csbs.text: 看哪！黑暗遮盖大地， 幽暗遮盖万民， 但耶和华必在你上面升起， 他的荣耀必显现在你身上。
